visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a black sheer-sleeved top over a grey tank top, stands in a large warehouse-style retail environment. She stands next to a refrigerated display case filled with small white circular tubs. In the background, other shoppers in casual attire and masks walk past stacks of merchandise on pallets. The lighting is bright and industrial. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of the refrigerated display case. Dozens of identical tubs labeled "Maple Walnut Cheese Spread" are neatly arranged. A yellow price tag showing "191" is visible at the top. The surrounding shelving contains boxes of bread or bagels. (3) The scene returns to the woman, who gestures towards the refrigerated case while speaking. She has a shopping cart handle in her left hand and uses her right hand to point at the products. Her facial expression is expressive and enthusiastic. (4) The woman leans over the display case, looking at the products. She then looks back at the camera and gives a thumbs up. A second hand enters the frame from the side to also give a thumbs up, signaling approval of the items in the case.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 限時優惠趕快搶 全部抹醬都8折. [Subtitle]: 天啊妹妹 現在再特價耶. (2) [Slogan]: 所有抹醬都折48元. [Subtitle]: 所有抹醬都折48元. (3) [Subtitle]: 抹醬控注意了 到八月底 所有抹醬都折48元 直接省一個50塊. (4) [Subtitle]: 誒 差很多誒 這樣子一個就不用200塊 而且. [Slogan]: 存量超多的. (5) [Subtitle]: 我跟大家講 這兩款抹醬都超好吃 甜的 鹹的 都超好吃. [Variety]: 甜的 鹹的 都超好吃. (6) [Subtitle]: 鹹的還可以拿來煮義大利麵 煮義大利麵真的超搭 燉飯也可以. (7) [Subtitle]: 這兩個抹醬放在冷凍庫 都可以放到兩個禮拜 保存得好 就可以吃得很好.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female speaker, 2 female shoppers in background, 1 male shopper in background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a sheer black off-the-shoulder long-sleeved top over a grey strapless top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco interior with high industrial ceilings, large pallets of goods, and refrigerated open-top display cases for dairy products.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a cheerful, mid-tempo synth-pop track featuring a steady electronic drum beat. A clear, energetic female voice speaking Mandarin starts immediately, expressing surprise and excitement. The environment has a noticeable but low-level indoor public space hum. (2) As the speaker continues, her tone remains consistently enthusiastic, with high pitch variability as she emphasizes specific words like prices and discounts. The music continues without interruption, maintaining its bright and upbeat texture. (3) The vocal delivery remains fluid and rapid-fire, detailing the uses of the product. The mix is well-balanced, with the speech clearly audible over the background music and the distant ambient noise of other people in the store. (4) The track maintains its consistency until the end of the video, with the speaker's tone shifting to a friendly, recommending style as she explains preservation methods. The music persists at a constant volume until the clip concludes.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Close-up -> Detailed Recommendation -> Preservation Tip/Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform viewers about a specific discount on cheese spreads at Costco and recommend their taste and versatility in cooking.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features a clear brand logo (Costco), focuses on a specific product, mentions precise discount amounts, and provides a direct recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density text overlays and enthusiastic narration are characteristic of short-form social media promotional content.
